content_body:
We are so grateful to have had the privilege of making memories in your beautiful cabin ~ full of peace and so much love. We look forward to making more memories together here in this Rustic Elegance! May the Lord continue to bless this home.

Happy New Year ~ Numbers 6: 24-26 "The Lord bless you, and keep you; The Lord make His face shine upon you, and be gracious to you; The Lord life up His countenance on you, and give you peace."
title: New Years in Beautiful Rustic Elegance
